_meta.keyKnowledge: We help build an artwork by sharing our own ideas.

_source.w: We help build an artwork by sharing our own ideas.
y: Our ideas matter and can be part of something bigger.
Choosing what to add helps us practise making decisions.
Working together shows us that many ideas make art richer.
eg: We pick an animal movement to add to a group dance.
We choose a colour for our part of a big painting.
We suggest a sound to add to a class song.
We pick a puppet to use in a group story.
We choose a material like feathers or paper for a collage.
We point to a picture we want to include in a class book.
